privileged_info_summary: The meal train dataset contains exactly 18 volunteer signups dated April 1-25, 2024. Three critical issues are planted: (1) A 4-day gap exists between April 5 and April 9 with no meal coverage, (2) April 12 has a duplicate scheduling conflict with two volunteers (Linda Martinez and Tom Anderson), and (3) Patricia Davis on April 16 has submitted 'Chicken noodle soup' which violates the family's vegetarian dietary requirement. The dataset spans 25 days with one additional time anomaly: Daniel Moore's delivery at 20:30 (8:30 PM) on April 19 is outside the preferred 17:00-19:00 window. All 18 meal entries are preserved with complete volunteer contact information. The task timeout is 300 seconds with a 50-step limit.
